input: 打开桌面上的 Python 文件夹
打开桌面上的 screenshot 那个图片
output: [{"action": "code", "script": ["import os, subprocess", "desktop = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop')", "files = os.listdir(desktop)", "target = next((f for f in files if f.lower().startswith('screenshot')), None)", "if target:", "    subprocess.run(['open', os.path.join(desktop, target)])", "else:", "    print('未找到 screenshot 文件')"]}]

input: 删除桌面上的 gameinstaller.dmg 文件
output: [{"action": "code", "script": [{"action": "code", "script": ["import os, subprocess", "desktop = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop')", "target = os.path.join(desktop, 'gameinstaller.dmg')", "if os.path.isfile(target):", "    trash_path = os.path.expanduser('~/.Trash')", "    subprocess.run(['mv', target, trash_path])", "    print('已移动到垃圾箱')", "else:", "    print('文件未找到')"]}]}]
